# Closes # (if applicable)

## Changes proposed in this Pull Request

## Checklist

- [ ] I consent to the release of this PR's code under the AGPLv3 license and non-code contributions under CC0-1.0 and CC-BY-4.0.
- [ ] License scan is done for the data source.
- [ ] A dataset is uploaded to PyPSA-Zambia Zenodo including specifying its' metadata.
- [ ] A data record is added to the data inventory.
- [ ] A description of each dataset is added to PyPSA-Zambia code repository.
- [ ] A parsing script is added to Zambia-Data parsers repository
- [ ] An option is added and documented in `config.default.yaml` and `config.tutorial.yaml` if applicable.
- [ ] If config sections were added, renamed, or removed, update `doc/assets/scripts/extract_config_snippets.py` accordingly.

- [ ] A note for the release notes `doc/release-notes.md` is amended in the format of previous release notes, including reference to the requested PR.
